message:
web: Filter public transcripts to team members only in index list

Previously, all public transcripts from any user would appear in the
index list. Now the list only shows public transcripts from users who
share a team with the viewer. Direct URL access to public transcripts
remains unchanged.

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/getthkx7tkm5aggt6yftwnl6
